notes: Aberdeen tracked more than 40 CDN vendors at peak in 2001.
Stringent market challenges of last 3 years pared CDN field to fewer than 12 vendors by 2004.

metric_value: one of top CDN vendors post-shakeout
notes: Mirror Image emerged as one of top CDN vendors after dot-bomb shakeout.
Mirror Image has 75 employees as of May 2004 profile.
Mirror Image founded in 1997; wholly owned subsidiary of Xcelera.com (Amex: XLA).

metric_value: more than 5 billion impressions per month (late 2003)
notes: Steve Chang (CTO Fastclick): delivering 5B+ ad impressions/month in late 2003 using Mirror Image CDN.

metric_name: CDN cost reduction benefit for Fastclick
metric_value: fewer servers, less room, less power, less floor space
notes: Fastclick CTO: CDN use reduced servers/room/power/floor space to meet performance thresholds.

metric_name: Security benefit of CDN for Fastclick
metric_value: traffic filtering/IDS not needed at origin; all via CDN
notes: Fastclick CTO: does not need traffic filtering or intrusion detection; CDN absorbs all traffic.
CDN usage rose dramatically during same period that vendor count fell from 40+ to under 12.

metric_value: moving beyond static/streaming to application delivery
notes: CDN survivors rapidly developing new services to move beyond basic image/page/media delivery toward application delivery.

metric_value: less than 45 days from request to production
notes: Toy retailer: Mirror Image moved from request to production-level SLA monitoring tool in under 45 days.

metric_value: significant price pressure on straight image/web site delivery
notes: Baseline CDN services (image and website delivery) under significant price pressure by 2004.

metric_value: XML rules engine; geotargeting; time-of-day; rotation; wild-card replacement
notes: Smart Content platform: XML rules distributed with content; end-users served from local data center using rules + cached content.

metric_value: central to on-the-fly content decisions by region
notes: Toy retailer director: adaptive caching central to making on-the-fly content decisions based on regional usage.

metric_value: IT groups + marketing/e-commerce/creative teams should evaluate distributed application delivery capabilities
notes: Aberdeen: IT groups in conjunction with marketing/e-commerce/creative should evaluate CDN application delivery capabilities.

metric_value: customers need verifiable data before shifting more content/app delivery to CDNs
notes: CDN customers need verifiable data before shifting more content and application delivery responsibility to CDNs.

metric_value: minimizes Mirror Image infrastructure costs; translates to lower client costs
notes: Regional CAP architecture reduces infrastructure costs; subsecond responses within regions; centralizes control/security/manageability.

metric_value: allows non-IT groups to manage content delivery directly
notes: Smart Content: non-IT groups (marketing, e-commerce) can insert content into CDN without IT/Web ops involvement.

metric_value: positioned to succeed as CDN evolves to application delivery
notes: Aberdeen: Smart Content platform positions Mirror Image well for next stage of web application delivery evolution.
